full_description: Count the green target blocks on the table, then press the red button the same number of times.
schema: {A} denotes the green target blocks, {B} denotes the red button, {a} denotes the arm used to press the button, {x} denotes the number of green target blocks
preference: Mention counting the target objects and pressing the button exactly that many times.
seen: Look around, count the green blocks, and press the red button that many times.
Find how many {A} are present and push {B} the same number of times.
Use vision to count {A}; then use {a} to press {B} {x} times.
Count the target blocks first, then confirm by pressing {B} {x} times.
unseen: Count the green blocks and press the red button the matching number of times.
Use {a} to push {B} once per green target block.
look around to count the green target blocks
push the red button once for each target block
